path.style: stroke-width: 6px; stroke-linecap: round; stroke-linejoin: round; stroke: rgb(255, 255, 255); fill: rgb(255, 255, 255);
stroke-width: 7px; stroke-linecap: round; stroke-linejoin: round; stroke: rgb(0, 0, 0); fill: none;
stroke-width: 13px; stroke-linecap: round; stroke-linejoin: round; stroke: rgb(10, 10, 10); fill: none;
